mentions.note: Legal database exposed to Anthropic tools; Westlaw competitor; down 39% YTD on AI displacement fears.

Financial/legal data (Westlaw) down 32% Q1 on AI competition fears; compiles financial data and legal research; right question isn't whether Claude can replicate but whether to wait to find out. Money managers won't.
